phases.description: Budget and goal alignment. We understand your commercial objectives, event brief, audience, and success metrics before any design work begins.
phases.title: Phase 1: Deep-Dive Discovery

phases.description: Storyboarding the brand experience. We map how visitors move, feel, and think through every stage of the booth journey.
phases.title: Phase 2: Narrative Design

phases.description: 3D rendering and iterative feedback. Full visualisation of the space, structure, graphics, lighting, and interaction zones reviewed with your team.
phases.title: Phase 3: Visual Prototyping

phases.description: Material sourcing and builder vetting. Materials, finishes, and fabrication partners selected for quality, durability, and logistics practicality.
phases.title: Phase 4: Expert Curation

phases.description: Pre-build validation for zero errors. Structural review, compliance check, and pre-assembly quality gate before production begins.
phases.title: Phase 5: Performance Testing

phases.description: Global shipping and on-site assembly. Packaging, customs, venue delivery, and installation managed end-to-end.
phases.title: Phase 6: Tactical Deployment

phases.description: Final 'white-glove' inspection and delivery. Every detail checked against the approved design before the show opens.
phases.title: Phase 7: Elite Handover

phases.description: Deconstruction and storage management. Breakdown, packing, return logistics, and reuse planning for future events.
phases.title: Phase 8: Post-Event Recovery

title: From Brief to Build, Our 8-Phase Booth Design Process
